response: With over 15 years of specialized experience in medical transcription and scribing across diverse specialties like Cardiology, Orthopedics, and Neurology, I offer a proven track record of accuracy and efficiency. My expertise includes advanced proficiency with EHR platforms such as eClinicalWorks and Experity, alongside strong leadership skills demonstrated through supervising teams and managing customer relationships. Having consistently exceeded productivity targets while maintaining strict adherence to turnaround times, I am eager to bring my dedication and medical terminology knowledge to your organization. My background combines technical precision with excellent interpersonal skills, ensuring seamless collaboration with physicians and administrative staff. I am a reliable, adaptable professional ready to contribute immediately to your team's success. With a typing speed of 70–80 WPM and a commitment to quality, I am prepared to support your medical documentation needs effectively. I welcome the opportunity to discuss how my extensive experience aligns with your specific requirements. Thank you for considering my application; I look forward to the possibility of contributing to your organization's growth.
